title: Enhanced Leaves
description: Addon that brings detailed leaves to Enhanced
body:
Enhanced Leaves brings detailed 3d leaves to Minecraft. Can be used with or without the main Enhanced pack.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ea341aafa7b3ebbf2aa08edb87d886277418185.jpeg)

**Install guide:**

1. Download [Enhanced](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jeelh-enhanced)
2. Download Enhanced Leaves
3. Install the packs in this order

![Install Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9602bfa1c5cc5fbc38f5e193d9f9261e5a802a7_0.webp)
